title: bidaria tingens
intro: Bidaria tingens is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bidaria tingens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Bidaria tingens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
